CustomField.description: When enabled, signers using this template can draw, add text, shapes and highlights (markup) on the document during signing. The marked-up PDF is saved back to the related record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Let signers mark up the PDF (pen, text, shapes, highlighter) while signing. The marked-up document is saved to the related record on approve or reject.
CustomField.label: Allow Markup
